temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man in the backseat of a car at night. He is wearing a dark suit jacket over a light-colored collared shirt. He holds a black smartphone to his right ear, engaged in a conversation. His expression is serious and slightly concerned. To the right, the out-of-focus shoulder and head of another person are visible in the foreground. The car's interior is dark, with the background outside the window blurred into streaks of city lights, indicating the vehicle is in motion. In the upper left corner of the frame, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera remains steady, maintaining its focus on the man on the phone. A man speaks in a calm and reassuring tone, as if trying to soothe someone. His voice is steady and gentle as he says in Mandarin, "The food is cooked, you have to eat it, right? Call me when you get off work, I'll reheat it for you." The background is quiet, with only the faint, ambient hum of a vehicle in motion, suggesting the conversation is taking place inside a moving car. There is no background music.
